title: 2.5inch Pills Crusher, Ceramics Spice Mill Grinder Set, Handheld Seasoning Mills Grinder,Porcelain Mortar and Pestle Tools Set Grinding Bowls, Set of 2
description:
About this item
1. A ceramic garlic mortar and pestle is a kitchen tool used to crush, grind and mix garlic. It provides a simple way to crush and grind , nuts and other substance that is softer than porcelain.
2. The mortar, or bowl, is made of ceramic material with a rough interior surface. The pestle, or grinding tool, is also made of ceramic and is used to crush the garlic cloves and grind them into a smooth paste.
3. They are easy to use, durable, and simple to clean.
4. The mortar comes with a flat and unglazed bottom for stability.Nice mortar with a pouring lip which also serves to hold the coordinating pestle in place.
5. A nice addition to kitchen, lab or pharmacy.
reviews_5s: I got this pill crusher to crush up my cat's pills. She has hyperthyroidism and has to take pills every day but refuses to swallow them, so I figured I'd crush them and put them in her food. This thing crushed them so good. It made them powder, and I had that stuff in her food. She ate it the first few days, but then began only eating part of her meals, leaving doubt that she was getting the full dosage. So I switched to a cream instead. It's a little more expensive, but easier. Also I dropped one of the pestle and it broke, but it came with 2 so that's cool.Great quality and you get 2 for a decent price. Very happy. Would recommendI have a senior Schnauzer that has to take pills for health reasons. Of course, it was a fight to get him to take his medicine and since he is blind and diabetic, I hated to stress him twice a day. I tried other pill crushers and they were really hard on my arthritic fingers. These ceramic crushers are great and getting 2 allows me to have one at home and keep one in my travel trailer when we go camping. They are substantial in weight and pretty to boot. Crushing his medicine is now done very quickly and there is no hassle from Zach and it no longer hurts my fingers. This purchase was a win, win for all concerned.Perfect for soy sauce and wasabi!I got these to grind up some rose petals I had dried ans they worked well! Adds to the apothecary vibe of my space but is also practical for use.Thinking about ordering another setI was looking for a smaller mortar and pestle for dog pills and these fit the bill. I like having a pair and they are small enough to store easily without taking up too much space. The interior is slightly rough which helps "hold" pills in place for grinding. And they're kinda cute too which is ALWAYS a bonus!! I would definitely recommend.Purchased these for our emergency kits. They are the perfect size for bug out bags.My senior toy poodle is so disagreeable when it comes to taking his meds this makes is soooo easy. Wish I did it ages agoSo grateful 🥰
reviews_1s:
This looks like a kindergarten art project. Measurements are off, the glaze has clumps, it’s porous, there are flaws everywhere, and the pestles are crooked. Total disaster. It’s only 8 bucks, but quicker to just burn $8 rather than waiting for this to arrive.You get what you pay for with this. While it will work just fine, the pestle only has porcelain on a small part of it. You will be gripping the rough part while using it. It feels creepy, like you are holding sandpaper.This motar and pestle is described as a "2.5" Pills Crusher." It is not designed for crushing pills. The inside of the motar bowl and the outside of the pestle are much too rough for medications. The groves hold WAY too much of the medication, medication that remains in the motar and on the pestle, medication the patient does not receive. It is also described as both "Porcelain" and "Ceramics" it is certainly not porcelain at best it is an extremely low-grade ceramic with defects.
It is pictured as white, it is gray.
It is pictured with a nice spout, it has a bump on the side.
I purchased for grinding medication it is certainly not suitable for my intended use, I will keep it as a pepper grinder.Completely worthless. I can't understand why they wouldn't put just 1 coat of glaze on this to make it smooth. It could be been a nice product. But it's very rough pourous ceramic and the crushed powder stays in the bowl and stick. So it's worthless and you ve also lost your medicine now. LolThey were to smallHighly disappointing. They aren't ceramic. I returned them.
